description_long: This is a modern motor yacht with a sleek, angular profile and a predominantly white exterior accented by black and tan details. The hull sits in a simulated blue water base, featuring a stepped bow and a streamlined stern with a swim platform. The superstructure includes multiple decks, with the upper deck housing a bridge area, antennae, and railings, while the main deck offers open spaces and seating areas. Large windows line the sides of the cabin, providing ample visibility and natural light to the interior. The yacht is equipped with various deck fittings, such as railings, posts, and a radar mast, and displays a distinctive black diagonal stripe on the hull. The overall design suggests luxury and functionality, suitable for leisure cruising in urban waterfronts or marinas.
description: A modern, angular white motor yacht with black accents, large windows, and multiple decks, set on a blue water base. Features include a stepped bow, open deck spaces, and a radar mast.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yacht's full length, stepped bow, black diagonal hull stripe, and upper deck details.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open stern, swim platform, and tiered deck arrangement with visible railings and posts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hull's length, black stripe, and the arrangement of windows and deck features.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the angular bow, forward windows, and the symmetry of the upper and main decks.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a stepped bow, deep-V profile, and a prominent black diagonal stripe on the white hull. The hull sits low in the water with a flat stern and integrated swim platform.
attribute_deck_layout: Multi-level deck with an open stern area, upper bridge deck with railings and antennae, and a main deck featuring walkways, seating, and large windows. The decks are connected by steps and bordered by safety railings.
attribute_cabin_structure: Single large cabin structure with angular lines, extensive side windows, and a forward-facing window array. The cabin is centrally located, with doors and access points visible on the main and upper decks.
